opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like raw sandpaper down there, urinating is agonising, and any contact causes bleeding and intense burning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Tonight after being intimate it became unbearable — really raw and burning, and I noticed a little blood. Peeing stings so badly I can hardly bear it. I need something to settle it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the dryness and rawness have crept up over about two years since my periods stopped; tonight it flared badly after being intimate
symptom_narrative.duration: worsening for ~2 years, with a severe flare over the last few hours tonight
symptom_narrative.character: raw, dry, like sandpaper; intense burning and itching around the outside, and stinging when I wee; a small amount of blood on contact
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has been — I can barely sit and everything down there is agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the outside and the opening, and it burns when urine passes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it flared tonight, worse with any contact and when passing urine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; the thrush creams from the chemist haven't helped at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any contact, being intimate, and passing urine over the raw skin
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: needing to pass urine much more often and a lot of stinging, like the water infections I keep getting
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have had several bladder/water infections over the past year that were confirmed on testing
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I am avoiding intimacy completely, and I am distressed and finding it hard to sit or move comfortably

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: went through menopause about two years ago
several water/bladder infections over the past year that were confirmed on testing

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter thrush creams (used repeatedly, no improvement)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: not on any hormone therapy; very distressed and avoiding intimacy because of the pain

objective_data_offered.value: took my temperature at home, it was about 36.8 and I don't feel feverish
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-taken reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: just a small amount of blood on the tissue after being intimate, not a heavy flow
my urine looks clear and normal, not cloudy or smelly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual impression, not a dipstick or laboratory result
